title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. obesum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. obesum, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. obesum include reducing inflammation and improving circulation, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to treat various health issues, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
